character.name: Create a cute chubby blond boy character for a 2D space-themed game. He should have short messy blond hair, fair skin, and a friendly, adventurous expression. The character wears a futuristic astronaut outfit with a colorful sci-fi style: space jacket, glowing details, utility belt, futuristic boots, and small space gadgets. Add fun accessories like a transparent space helmet, jetpack, holographic wrist device, and star or planet patches on the clothes. Style: cartoon, game character design, full body, front view, high detail, vibrant colors, clean background, expressive pose, suitable for a platform/adventure game, modern indie game art style.
